[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / sq

# Method: sq()

```ts
sq(value): number;
```

Square a number.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Value to square. |

## Returns

`number`

Value multiplied by itself.
